name: Parallax42 Compliance Intelligence Agent
description: Evaluator-facing FastAPI wrapper around the existing Node/CommonJS Parallax42 compliance agent. It normalizes legal/compliance case intake, runs deterministic evidence and control rules, and returns a human-review decision package with JSONL trace logging.

agents.name: Intake Agent
agents.role: Normalizes evaluator input into the Parallax42 compliance case shape.

agents.name: Evidence Retrieval Agent
agents.role: Maps supplied evidence text and local reference signals into review context.

agents.name: Privacy Specialist
agents.role: Checks DPA, subprocessor, retention, deletion, and cross-border data controls.

agents.name: Security Specialist
agents.role: Checks SOC 2, ISO 27001, identity, access, logging, and integration controls.

agents.name: Responsible AI Specialist
agents.role: Checks model-training ambiguity, human oversight, and no-auto-approval boundaries.

agents.name: Learning & Precedent Specialist
agents.role: Adds governed precedent context without changing deterministic decisions.

agents.name: Compass Advisory Critic
agents.role: Performs a live OpenAI-compatible Compass advisory review in non-sample mode when credentials are configured; advisory only.

agents.name: Final Advisory Reviewer
agents.role: Optional live CrewAI advisory reviewer when AGENT_RUNTIME=crewai_live and CREWAI_ENABLE_LIVE_LLM=1; advisory only.

agents.name: Deterministic Decision Owner
agents.role: Runs the local rules engine and owns the final non-LLM decision.

agents.name: Audit Packager
agents.role: Packages the structured response, trace, and reviewer actions.

tools_used.name: nodejs
tools_used.purpose: Existing product compliance runtime and deterministic rules modules

tools_used.name: compass-api
tools_used.purpose: OpenAI-compatible Compass endpoint configuration probe and optional advisory calls

tools_used.name: qdrant
tools_used.purpose: Optional Agentathon evidence-memory RAG path; active only when Qdrant and Compass embedding env vars are configured and smoke-tested

tools_used.name: governed-learning-memory
tools_used.purpose: Advisory reviewer outcome and control-pattern memory; not model training and never final decision authority

tools_used.name: crewai
tools_used.purpose: Optional live advisory council only when optional dependencies are installed and AGENT_RUNTIME=crewai_live with CREWAI_ENABLE_LIVE_LLM=1

data_sources: local sample evidence text supplied in each Agentathon request
sanitized local reference context under reference_context/ when used by the product runtime
optional configured Qdrant evidence index; inactive unless explicit environment variables are supplied
synthetic governed learning memory under data/sample_learning_memory.json
limitations: The Agentathon wrapper does not require browser clicks, manual uploads, or private local setup.
In non-sample mode, /run attempts a live Compass/OpenAI-compatible advisory call when OPENAI_API_KEY is configured; failures are returned as structured advisory-unavailable metadata.
Qdrant, RBAC enforcement, and live CrewAI are not claimed active unless configured and separately verified; the default Agentathon runtime is custom.
CrewAI is optional and advisory only; it is not installed by the default Docker build and cannot override deterministic decisions.
Governed learning memory is advisory only, is not model training, and does not silently modify compliance policy.
The deterministic decision package is for human legal/compliance review and is not legal advice or automatic approval.
